    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_0m0bvsq" name="Init Variables" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">

      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_0ba03og</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try {
    var isAlive = true;
    var errorCode = '0';
    var errorMessage = '';

    execution.setVariable('showToast', false);
    execution.setVariable('toastMessage', '');

    //Get template information stored in symphony in template

    //Store the endpoint read from the template in a symphony variable to use it in the next steps
    execution.setVariable('meteringEndpoint', jsonTemplate.meteringEndpoint);
    execution.setVariable('keyCloakEndpoint', jsonTemplate.keyCloakEndpoint);
    execution.setVariable(
        'keyCloakHeaders',
        JSON.stringify(jsonTemplate.keyCloakHeaders)
    );
    execution.setVariable('keyCloakBody', jsonTemplate.keyCloakBody);
    execution.setVariable('odooEndpoint', jsonTemplate.odooEndpoint);
    execution.setVariable('pollingEndpoint', jsonTemplate.pollingEndpoint);
    execution.setVariable('b2wEndpoint', jsonTemplate.b2wEndpoint);
    execution.setVariable('tenantId', jsonTemplate.tenantId);
    execution.setVariable('orgToken', jsonTemplate.orgToken);
    execution.setVariable(
        'meteringKeyCloakEndpoint',
        jsonTemplate.meteringKeyCloakEndpoint
    );
    execution.setVariable(
        'meteringKeyCloakHeaders',
        JSON.stringify(jsonTemplate.meteringKeyCloakHeaders)
    );
    execution.setVariable(
        'meteringKeyCloakBody',
        jsonTemplate.meteringKeyCloakBody
    );
    execution.setVariable('status', 'SUCCESS');

    var accessToken = execution.getVariable('X-Auth-Request-Access-Token');

    if (!accessToken) {
        var request = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('request'));
        accessToken = request['X-Auth-Request-Access-Token'];
    }

    execution.setVariable('token', accessToken);
    execution.setVariable('cartB2WEndpoint', jsonTemplate.cartB2WEndpoint);

    execution.setVariable('isAlive', isAlive);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', errorCode);
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', errorMessage);
} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
    execution.setVariable('errorCode', 'INIT_FAILED');
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}
]]></script>

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_19xewl1" name="check search" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_0gpald0</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1kofs72</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[
    // ----------------------------
    // Voltura Fibra: lettura response DMA service.point (ARRAY) e regola di stato
    // ----------------------------
    try {
        var searchResponse = JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('search_response'));

        var stateCodeSuccess = execution.getVariable('state_code_ok');
        var stateCodeError = execution.getVariable('state_code_invalid');

        var searchOk = false;
        var podPdrSupplyState = '';
        var podPdrAddress = '';
        var podPdrClientId = null;
        var servicePointId = null;
        var stateCode = stateCodeSuccess;

        function arrayIncludes(arr, item) {
            for (var i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
                if (arr[i] == item) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
            return false;
        }

        function handleInvalidState() {
            searchOk = false;
            stateCode = stateCodeError;
        }

        function handleNotFound() {
            searchOk = false;
            stateCode = stateCodeError;
        }

        function handleOk() {
            searchOk = true;
            stateCode = stateCodeSuccess;
        }

        function processResponse() {
            var servicePoints;
            var sp;

            if (searchResponse.code !== 200) {
                return handleNotFound();
            }

            try {
                servicePoints = JSON.parse(searchResponse.body);
            } catch (err) {
                return handleNotFound();
            }

            if (servicePoints && servicePoints.length > 0) {
                sp = servicePoints[0];
            } else {
                return handleNotFound();
            }

            // service.point.state: 'active'/'inactive'/'activating'/'deactivating'/'refused'
            var stateLabels = {
                active: 'Attivo',
                activating: 'In attivazione',
                inactive: 'Cessato',
                deactivating: 'In cessazione',
                refused: 'Rifiutato'
            };
            var state = sp.state;
            podPdrSupplyState = stateLabels[state] || state;

            podPdrAddress = sp.service_address;
            podPdrClientId = sp.client_id;
            servicePointId = sp.id;

            if (!podPdrSupplyState || !podPdrClientId) {
                return handleInvalidState();
            }

            // OK su Attivo / In cessazione (coerente con BBP Sez.1)
            if (arrayIncludes(['active', 'deactivating'], state)) {
                return handleOk();
            }

            return handleInvalidState();
        }

        processResponse();

        execution.setVariable('searchOk', searchOk);
        execution.setVariable('podPdrAddress', podPdrAddress);
        execution.setVariable('podPdrClientId', podPdrClientId);
        execution.setVariable('podPdrSupplyState', podPdrSupplyState);
        execution.setVariable('state_code', stateCode);
        execution.setVariable('servicePointId', servicePointId);
    } catch (err) {
        execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
        execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
    }
]]></script>
    </scriptTask>

      <incoming>SequenceFlow_1tuuh2i</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1skzr20</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[try {
    // ----------------------------
    // Input gathering
    // ----------------------------

    var getClientResponse = JSON.parse(
        execution.getVariable('get_client_response')
    );

    var partnerSelectionsResult = JSON.parse(
        execution.getVariable('partnerSelectionsResult')
    );

    // ----------------------------
    // Local variable initialization
    // ----------------------------

    var podCustomerSegment = '';
    var podCustomerName = '';
    var podCustomerCode = '';
    var customerSegmentOptions = [];

    // ----------------------------
    // Main Execution
    // ----------------------------

    var client;

    try {
        client = JSON.parse(getClientResponse.body);
    } catch (err) {
        throw new Error('Failed to load client data: ' + err.message);
    }

    if (partnerSelectionsResult.code === 200) {
        var body = JSON.parse(partnerSelectionsResult.body);
        customerSegmentOptions = body.economic_segment || [];
    }

    podCustomerSegment = client['economic_segment'] || '';
    podCustomerName = client['name'] || '';
    podCustomerCode = client['user_sequence'] || '';

    // ----------------------------
    // Output
    // ----------------------------

    execution.setVariable('podCustomerSegment', podCustomerSegment);
    execution.setVariable('podCustomerName', podCustomerName);
    execution.setVariable('podCustomerCode', podCustomerCode);
    execution.setVariable(
        'customerSegmentOptions',
        JSON.stringify(customerSegmentOptions)
    );
} catch (err) {
    execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
    execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
}
]]></script>

      <incoming>SequenceFlow_074w2cb</incoming>

      <script><![CDATA[
    // ----------------------------
    // Voltura Fibra: esito conformita (entrambi i documenti devono essere conformi)
    // ----------------------------
    try {
        var conformityIdDoc = execution.getVariable('conformity_id_doc');
        var conformityVolturaModule = execution.getVariable('conformity_voltura_module');

        var stateCodeOk = execution.getVariable('state_code_ok');
        var stateCodeErr = execution.getVariable('state_code_non_conforming');

        var stateCode = stateCodeOk;
        var conformityOk = false;

        function allConforming() {
            var CONFORMING = 'conforming';
            return conformityIdDoc === CONFORMING && conformityVolturaModule === CONFORMING;
        }

        if (!conformityIdDoc || !conformityVolturaModule) {
            throw new Error('Node reached with incomplete conformity information.');
        }

        if (allConforming()) {
            stateCode = stateCodeOk;
            conformityOk = true;
        } else {
            stateCode = stateCodeErr;
            conformityOk = false;
        }

        execution.setVariable('state_code', stateCode);
        execution.setVariable('conformityOk', conformityOk);
    } catch (err) {
        execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
        execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
    }
]]></script>

    <scriptTask id="ScriptTask_1ovwvn2" name="Prep save" scriptFormat="javascript" activiti:async="false" activiti:exclusive="false" activiti:autoStoreVariables="false">
      <incoming>SequenceFlow_04kwmfq</incoming>
      <outgoing>SequenceFlow_1eskab8</outgoing>
      <script><![CDATA[
    // ----------------------------
    // Voltura Fibra: payload di salvataggio (conformita + motivazioni per-documento)
    // ----------------------------
    try {
        var servicePointCode = execution.getVariable('service_point_code');
        var assetType = execution.getVariable('assetType');
        var podPdrClientId = execution.getVariable('podPdrClientId');

        var conformityIdDoc = execution.getVariable('conformity_id_doc');
        var conformityVolturaModule = execution.getVariable('conformity_voltura_module');

        var nonConformityReasonIdDoc = execution.getVariable('id_doc_nonconformity_reason');
        var nonConformityReasonVolturaModule = execution.getVariable('voltura_module_nonconformity_reason');

        var idDocReasonMap = {
            missing: 'Il documento di identità non è presente tra gli allegati inviati',
            unreadable: 'Il documento di identità è illeggibile',
            expired: 'Il documento di identità è scaduto'
        };

        var volturaModuleReasonMap = {
            incomplete: 'Il modulo di voltura compilato online non è completo'
        };

        var _reasons = [];

        if (
            conformityIdDoc === 'nonconforming' &&
            nonConformityReasonIdDoc &&
            idDocReasonMap[nonConformityReasonIdDoc]
        ) {
            _reasons.push(idDocReasonMap[nonConformityReasonIdDoc]);
        }
        if (
            conformityVolturaModule === 'nonconforming' &&
            nonConformityReasonVolturaModule &&
            volturaModuleReasonMap[nonConformityReasonVolturaModule]
        ) {
            _reasons.push(volturaModuleReasonMap[nonConformityReasonVolturaModule]);
        }

        var contract_end_reason = '';
        if (_reasons.length > 0) {

      <script><![CDATA[
    // ----------------------------
    // Voltura Fibra: costruzione URL ricerca SP via DMA (Direct Model Access RIP)
    // ----------------------------
    try {
        var service_point_code = execution.getVariable('service_point_code');
        var baseUrl = execution.getVariable('odooEndpoint');

        // DMA in modalita ricerca: il wildcard '*' e' obbligatorio per usare _filter_.
        // Dominio Odoo: lista di tuple (campo, operatore, valore). encodeURIComponent
        // gestisce gli spazi del codice SP (formato "S.P. - " + cifre).
        var filter = '[("code","=","' + service_point_code + '"),("commodity","=","fiber")]';
        var searchUrl = baseUrl + 'service.point/*?_filter_=' + encodeURIComponent(filter);

        execution.setVariable('assetType', 'fiber');
        execution.setVariable('searchUrl', searchUrl);
    } catch (err) {
        execution.setVariable('isAlive', false);
        execution.setVariable('errorMessage', err.message);
    }
]]></script>
